PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Donna Quan for Dennis Wu.

Ms. Quan stated that they directed the Messenger to file the lost codicil on the January 15th and that her Client does not know where original codicil is. The Court noted that a copy of the lost codicil was attached to the Declaration of Dennis Wu filed on January 16th and directed Ms. Quan to file the lost codicil in the will file. The Petition for Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary was taken under submission pending a copy of the lost codicil being filed in the will file.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
